description: In 2006, Greenpeace launched a massive campaign targeting the soy industry's role in Amazon deforestation. This led to the Soy Moratorium, an agreement by major grain traders to stop buying soy grown on recently deforested land.

key_events.description: Greenpeace publishes 'Eating up the Amazon' report exposing supply chain links.
Fast food chains like McDonald's threaten to drop suppliers sourcing from deforested areas.
ABIOVE members sign the formal Soy Moratorium agreement.

calibration_notes: Displays the efficacy of corporate-targeted campaigns that bypass government policy to force market changes.
